semantic.role: Issue template for suggesting documentation improvements
responsibilities: Collecting links to specific pages or files needing work
Describing the nature of the change (edit, missing content, unclear section)
outOfScope: Bug reports or feature requests unrelated to documentation
Code changes or pull request templates

English.purpose: This document provides a structured issue template for contributors to suggest improvements to the project's documentation, including README, examples, and website copy.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for community contributors and maintainers who want to report or propose fixes to documentation gaps, errors, or unclear sections. It ensures all documentation feedback is captured with a clear page reference and a specific description of the needed change.
key_takeaways: Template requires two fields: the page needing work and a description of the change.
Labels are automatically set to 'documentation' for easy triage.
The template is designed to reduce ambiguity in documentation requests.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档提供了一个结构化的问题模板，供贡献者提出对项目文档（包括README、示例和网站文案）的改进建议。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向社区贡献者和维护者，用于报告或建议修复文档中的遗漏、错误或不清晰的部分。该模板确保所有文档反馈都附带明确的页面引用和具体的修改描述。
key_takeaways: 模板需要两个字段：需要修改的页面和修改内容的描述。
标签自动设置为'documentation'，便于分类处理。
该模板旨在减少文档请求中的歧义。
